test: pre-specified incremental M->M+C, grouped leave-one-block-out OOF (no leakage)
design: each match-block = 1 positive + up to 8 expression-matched negatives; residualization (spec~mag, coh~mag), scaler, and logistic all fit on TRAIN fold only; predictions out-of-fold
interpretation: The incremental controllership signal survives leakage-free out-of-fold evaluation: OOF gain +0.305 (optimism only +0.087 vs apparent +0.393), hierarchical block-bootstrap CI [+0.131,+0.603] excludes 0, within-block permutation p=0.002. This is the Phase-0 confirmatory gate from the TCR-RescueMap spec; the +0.357 apparent incremental estimate is now backed by an OOF-hardened +0.305 [+0.131,+0.603].
